meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome being stuck with basic apps. A beginner-level resource page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you are building isolated scripts, not scalable systems. The Antigravity project template bridges this gap by providing a production-grade architecture that handles state, API integration, and deployment patterns out-of-the-box. By leveraging Claude Code, you automate the boilerplate, allowing you to focus on high-level application logic.
content.intro:
The screen stares back, a blinking cursor in a sea of boilerplate code that leads nowhere. You have mastered the syntax, followed the tutorials, and built the 'To-Do' list, yet your portfolio remains stagnant. You feel the crushing weight of the 'tutorial hell' gap—where your current skills meet the wall of real-world complexity.

But the wall is an illusion. The difference between a student project and a production-grade application isn't just more code; it's the architecture. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you gain a professional foundation that transforms your chaotic scripts into structured, maintainable software. It is time to stop building toys and start building systems.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure and environment configuration required for scalable AI applications.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the base Antigravity template with support for TypeScript and environment variable management.

steps.title: Configure the AI Provider Layer
steps.description: Connect your application to LLM providers using the built-in abstraction layer to ensure your code remains provider-agnostic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the AI client service to handle API key injection and default error handling for Anthropic models.

steps.title: Implement State Persistence
steps.description: Integrate a lightweight database schema to allow your app to remember user sessions and previous interactions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for user interactions and integrate an ORM layer within the Antigravity architecture.

steps.title: Develop the Core Logic Loop
steps.description: Build the main application logic that processes user input through the AI layer and returns a structured response.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core logic loop in the services/app-orchestrator.ts file to handle user requests and stream AI outputs.

steps.title: Deploy to Production Environment
steps.description: Prepare your application for live access by generating the necessary build artifacts and deployment configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Dockerfile and CI/CD pipeline configuration optimized for the Antigravity template deployment.

pro_tips: Always use environment variables for API keys; never hardcode credentials, even in local testing.
Implement a 'dry-run' mode in your orchestrator to test LLM logic without consuming expensive tokens.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your service layer before you write the UI; TDD is the fastest way to learn.
Treat your project's README as a product spec—documenting the 'why' is more valuable to recruiters than just the 'how'.
Leverage the Antigravity modular structure to swap out your frontend framework without rewriting your backend business logic.
resources: Modern Web Development Best Practices: https://developer.mozilla.org
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, iterate by adding a user authentication layer and deploying to a cloud provider like Vercel or Railway.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the architecture, and the roadmap to move beyond the basics. Stop waiting for the perfect moment to build your legacy. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
